title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent

title: bytedance/deer-flow

title: TDD × AI の10のアンチパターン — Claude Code で陥りやすい罠と対策
Claude Codeの見落としをCodexで拾い、再発防止まで回すOSSを作りました
【Claude Code解析】Anthropic Conway完全実装ガイド - 常時稼働AIエージェントを作ってみた
自サービスのAPIをMCPとしてClaude Codeから利用する
Investigating Autonomous Agent Contributions in the Wild: Activity Patterns and Code Change over Time
description: The rise of large language models for code has reshaped software development. Autonomous coding agents, able to create branches, open pull requests, and perform code reviews, now actively contribute to real-world projects. Their growing role offers a unique and timely opportunity to investigate AI-driven contributions and their effects on code quality, team dynamics, and software maintainability.
authors: Razvan Mihai Popescu, David Gros, Andrei Botocan

title: From Component Manipulation to System Compromise: Understanding and Detecting Malicious MCP Servers
description: The model context protocol (MCP) standardizes how LLMs connect to external tools and data sources, enabling faster integration but introducing new attack vectors. Despite the growing adoption of MCP, existing MCP security studies classify attacks by their observable effects, obscuring how attacks behave across different MCP server components and overlooking multi-component attack chains. Meanwhile
authors: Yiheng Huang, Zhijia Zhao, Bihuan Chen
